source_brief:
- Users must be able to record basic plant observations from a command-line interface.
- The app should store plant observation entries in a local file.
- Users must be able to list previously recorded plant observations.
- The system should provide a traceable test plan for each plant observation requirement.
- Final acceptance should require human review before release.
